problem id: a4dd4cce
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(4) XOR SHR(5)

examples:
  11010110 -> 01100110
  10101111 -> 11110101
  01011000 -> 10000010
  11010010 -> 00100110
  11110101 -> 01010111
  11100011 -> 00110111
  11110111 -> 01110111
  01101010 -> 10100011

query: 01001011
predicted answer: 10110010
